name: Huly
description: Huly — OSS all-in-one project management platform combining issues, docs, HR, and team communication tools.

seo.title: Huly — Developer Portals / API Management
seo.meta_description: Huly: Huly — OSS all-in-one project management platform combining issues, docs, HR, and team communication tools.

when_to_use: OSS project management replacing Linear + Notion stack
Self-hosted team workspace with full data ownership
HR and issues management in single OSS platform
Team communication with docs and project tracking
Open-source Jira/Confluence alternative for small teams

cons: Not an API management tool despite tag
Smaller community than Linear or Jira
review.verdict: Ambitious open-source all-in-one suite, but miscategorized here and still maturing for production use.
review.best_for: Small teams wanting self-hosted Jira plus Notion replacement
review.not_for: Enterprises needing battle-tested stability and SLAs

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Free/open-source — no commercial pricing, no HWM.
